content: Cloud Run Spring Boot JVM cold starts take 5-15 seconds by default. Key mitigations: (1) Enable startup CPU boost — reduces startup by 30-50% at no extra cost; (2) Set min-instances=1 to prevent cold starts entirely for a personal project; (3) GraalVM native image reduces to sub-500ms but complex to set up. For a personal app, min-instances=1 is the pragmatic choice. Without it, every request after 15 minutes idle hits a cold start.
